titleStmt.title: SII 39.173: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 173. (A.R. No. 173 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARĀGHAVA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME MAṆḌAPA. DĒVARĀYA-MAHĀRĀYA.

summary.p: This inscription is may the continuation of the above inscription and mentions the confirmation of the gift by the officer Sirigirinātan.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
sādāraṇa varuṣam Āvaṇi māsattu Aparapakṣattu
śaṣaṣṭiyil śrī mat cirikirinātaṉ tiruppuṭkuḻit tāṉikaṟku Aḻiya
varakkāṭṭiṉa kāriyam candrakiri Irājyattil tāmaṟkoṭṭattil tiruppukkuḻi
poreṟṟu perumāḷ stānattil cantirakiriyiṟ paṇṭārattil coṭi Āka cela
lum poṉ ṉūṟṟu muppatu Oṉṟum paṇam Āṟekālum Ittāle Eṅkaḷ pe
rumāḷ Aṅkaraṅka pokam naṭavāteṉṟutevar dharmmam Āka poreṟṟu peru
dharmmam Eṉṟu sthānikar namakku viṇṇappa ceyikaiyil tām tiruvuḷḷa
m paṟṟi sādhāraṇa varuṣam vaikāci māsam pavurṇamiyilum puṇṇi
yakālattile pampākṣētrattil śrī virupākṣadeva sannadhiyil Āśandrārkastā
yi Āka sarvamānya Āka Inta coṭi nūṟṟu muppattu Oru poṉṉum paṇam Āṟekā
lum Itu koṇṭu nammuṭaiya perāle perumāḷukku nāḷtoṟum nālu harivāṇa
tiruppaṇiyum tirunāḷum naṭattumpaṭi tārai Iṟaittu mun tiruvuḷḷam
paṟṟiyinakku Uttāra Irāyasam varukaiyil niṅkaḷ Intaccoṭipoṉ ṉūṟṟu
muppattu Oṉṟum paṇam Āṟekālukku nālu Arivāṇamum tiruppaṇiyum nammuṭai
ya perāle naṭakkattakkatāka Uṉṉuṭaiya tiruvahicciṭṭi kuṭuttu Ellā sarva
mānyaṅkaḷāṉa teyvastānaṅkaḷ marikāti naṭattikkoṇṭu varavum Inta
completely worn Out
tuti ciku ttaṉākak koṇṭu Irāyasapratiyyai Uṉṉuṭaiya vahiyile Eḻutu vi
ttu cāsanamāka na kaiyile Irāyasa mīḷa kuṭuppateṉṟu tathātithiyi
lum devarāya mahārāyar nammuṭaiya perāle Irāyasam tiruvuḷḷa paṟṟu
kaiyil Anta Irāyasa 4 vahiyile Eḻutuvittom Anta rāyasapramāṉa
ttukku Uṅkaḷ tānatdhil Araimaṉaiyil Oṭukkum coṭi makimai Uṭpaṭa poṉ ṉūṟṟu muppat
toru poṉṉum paṇa Āṟekālum sauḍavaruṣattukku cellum sādhāraṇa varu
ṣam vaikāci māsattil paurṇami Ārabhamāka tiruppuṭkuḻiyile poreṟṟu
perumāḷukku Irāyar tirunāmattile nāḷtoṟum nālu harivā
ṇamum naivedyamum varuṣam toṟum Irāyar tirunāmattāle
Āvaṇi mātattil naṭattum tirunāḷukkum tiruppaṇikkum kuṭu
tom Ānapaṭiyāle nūṟṟu muppatu toru poṉṉum
paṇam Āṟekālukkum nāḷtoṟum nālu harivāṇamum
naivedyamum Āvaṇittirunāḷum tiruppaṇiyum nāḷtoṟu
naṉṟāka naṭattavum Irāyakula dharmmamāka Āśandrararkkasthāhi
Āka Irāyatarmmamāka naṭattavum
Digital edition of SII 39.173 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
